title: Steam Deck loading screen
description: This RP replaces the mojang logo and colors with the steam deck logo and colors.
body:
This RP replaces the mojang logo and colors with the steam deck logo and colors.
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Due to Minecraft limitations/lack of experience on my part, I haven't been able to change the background color yet, and it doesn't look the best or the way I'd like it to.
